meaning: adj.摩尔人的,(建筑,家具等)摩尔人式的,摩尔人风格的
examples: Stands not in need of Moorish spear or bow.
The synagogue was noted for its Moorish style and resemblance to the Alhambra.
As its name indicates, it was one of the Moorish settlements, and nearly one of the most northern.
Christopher Oram's set is a splendid Moorish Seville palace, but his costumes are vintage flower power.
The decor in the hotel's rooms captures different eras of Spain's past with Andalusian, Castilian and Moorish elements.
